category_sources: Official SourceForge basE91 page categorizes it under Data Formats and describes encoding binary data as ASCII characters.
source_facts.description says base91 encodes and decodes base91 files.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title uses `basE91`.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the linked official project surface and best available documentation surface found.
source_facts.homepage is the official basE91 site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official basE91 site and SourceForge page expose project/download information but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page describes basE91 as an encoding method for binary data as ASCII characters.
